name: FYGameCompany
short_description: Build your game empire! Manage a company, develop hits, win honors. Recruit, innovate, cultivate, invest. Real exp, free dev, pers. cult., fun play.
detailed_description:
Build your own gaming empire! Manage a game company, develop bestsellers, and win industry honors!

Game Introduction Can you become a legend in the gaming world? Welcome to Floating Cloud Game Company! Here, you will play as the owner of a game company, starting from scratch to build your own company, recruit top talent, develop your own bestselling games, compete for the Game of the Year award, and become a leader in the industry!

  • Recruit Employees: Build your dream team, from planners to artists, providing full creative and operational support for your game.

  • Innovative Development: Explore dozens of game types and content combinations, create unique games, break conventions, and attract global players.

  • Employee Training: Customize career development plans for your team, enhance productivity and creativity, and build a high-performing game development team.

  • Stock Market Profits: Invest flexibly in the stock market, expand your company's fund pool, and seize every business opportunity to keep your company funded.

  • Pursue Glory: Hit million-unit sales, win industry awards, reach the peak of the gaming world, and become a legend among legends!

  • Battle System: Are your employees showing signs of quitting? Are your talents being poached by competitors? Use the battle system to retain them and keep your dream team intact.

  • Shopping Street: Satisfy your shopping cravings, purchase props and food to boost your game development and company growth.

  • Fun Mini-games: Relax with mini-games and make the tough entrepreneurial process more enjoyable.

  • 108 Characters: Grow together with diverse employees, making your entrepreneurial journey less lonely.

  • 10 Hidden Characters: Unlock hidden characters to add mysterious power to your career and help you succeed.

Key Features

  • Real Gaming Industry Experience: From a startup to a global empire, showcase your management and business skills.

  • Free Development Direction: Explore a wide range of game ideas to cater to different player groups and create your own classics.

  • Personalized Employee Training: Unlock your employees' potential, help them grow, and lead the team to success.

  • Fun Casual Gameplay: Stock market investments, marketing, fun mini-games, and battle systems – all essential for a rich gaming experience.

Download over 10,000 times to unlock the second chapter of the game

  • Hundreds of Fun Mini-Games: Keep you entertained and enjoy the fun of the entrepreneurial process.

  • Character Bond System: Strengthen interactions and emotions between characters to make your team more cohesive.

  • Romance System: Amid the busy startup process, experience an office romance, adding more diversity to the game.

  • Big Story Mode: Each character gets their own independent story, with more detailed backgrounds and emotions, keeping you immersed.

Download now and start your legendary gaming journey!

supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Korean, Italian
*languages with full audio support
